offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 subscriptions/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We automate payment reminders instead of manual tracking of subscription renewals.
problem: missed payment deadlines leading to late fees
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Community forums for accounting firms sharing tools
try_it: Let users try monthly payment reminders on 1-3 subscriptions
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing subscription data
